name: @gravity-platform/salesforce
description: Salesforce integration for Gravity workflow system — query, read, create, and update records via MCP tools

nodes.name: Salesforce
nodes.description: Query with SOQL, read/create/update records, and inspect object metadata in a Salesforce org

credentials.name: Salesforce Connected App
credentials.description: My Domain URL + Consumer Key/Secret from a Salesforce connected app (OAuth2 client credentials). The node mints access tokens automatically.
